subject: LETTER OF DEMAND - Outstanding Payment of SGD 50,000

claims.basis: Unpaid invoice for goods/services supplied under the agreement.

deadline: 14 days from the date of this letter
consequences: If payment is not received by the deadline, our client reserves its rights to commence legal proceedings without further notice, including a claim for interest and costs.
body_html:
Dear Sirs,

We act for Party A in this matter. Our client is owed SGD 50,000 under an invoice dated 1 June 2024 with payment terms of 30 days. Despite the due date of 1 July 2024 having long passed, no payment has been received.

We hereby demand payment of SGD 50,000 within 14 days of the date of this letter, failing which our client will commence legal proceedings without further notice.
